title: hieracium misaucinum subsp. gasterenenese
intro: Hieracium misaucinum subsp. gasterenenese is a lesser-known plant species within the Hieracium genus, specifically a subspecies of the Hieracium misaucinum plant. However, I was unable to find any reliable information about the medicinal properties, health benefits, or herbal preparations of Hieracium misaucinum subsp. gasterenenese.
